name: AI-Powered Suggestions
description: Generates context-aware improvement suggestions for the active project using Haiku. Categorizes them as bug fixes, new features, extensions, or general, and manages ignore/dismiss state.

Managers/HelperManager.cs.content:
enum SuggestionCategory
    General, BugFixes, NewFeatures, Extensions
class Suggestion
  Title: string
  Description: string
  Category: SuggestionCategory
class HelperManager
  Suggestions: ObservableCollection<Suggestion>
  IsGenerating: bool
  SetActiveTaskSource(Func<IEnumerable<string>> getDescriptions) -> void
  SwitchProjectAsync(string projectPath) -> Task
  GenerateSuggestionsAsync(string projectPath, SuggestionCategory category, string? guidance = null, CancellationToken externalToken = default) -> Task
  CancelGeneration() -> void
  Dispose() -> void
  ClearSuggestions() -> void
  RemoveSuggestion(Suggestion suggestion) -> void
  IgnoreSuggestion(Suggestion suggestion) -> void
  ClearIgnoredTitles() -> void
  Title: string
  Description: string

dependencies: Calls Haiku to analyze project and generate suggestions
Reads active task descriptions for context
